why_this_action: The owned-content lane just published a valid Telegraph article, but it selected a repeat review-surface guide before the still-unpublished first-task qualification guide. During the same hold window, the highest-leverage internal repair was to make future owned-content selection prefer the first-task qualification asset that is closer to free use.
shared_findings_reused: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: improve the free-use path and create proof assets closest to first use
distribution_lane_latest.json: owned_content is the truthful lane during the hold window
posted_urls.json: review_ai_coding_output_before_merge already had a recent Telegraph publication history
expected_outcome: The next truthful owned-content slot will publish the first-task qualification guide before another review-surface reuse, improving the odds of moving evaluators from interest into a real first run.
measurement_window: Apply on the next owned-content execution during the current conversion bottleneck window.
